analysis.cors_fix_status: CONFIRMED_WORKING - No CORS errors after origin fix to www.qianwen.com
analysis.root_cause: H2 framing issue when proxy injects response into HTTP/2 stream. CORS origin mismatch from #399 resolved but H2 protocol error remains as sole blocker.
analysis.comparison_with_399: CORS errors eliminated (was main issue in #399). H2 error is independent of CORS.
analysis.next_steps: H2 framing fix needed at proxy level. Consider HTTP/1.1 downgrade or proper H2 DATA frame construction.

summary.result: BLOCKED_ERROR_H2_PROTOCOL — CORS fix confirmed working but H2 protocol error persists. Key diagnostic finding: CORS and H2 are independent issues.
